_comment: stoiclife Phase 2 config. Thresholds are expressed as deltas vs the rolling baseline, not absolute cutoffs. Tune here, not in code.

sleep_score._comment: FEAT-01 Part A: self-computed nightly sleep score (0-100). Targets recalibrated 2026-06-16 to Mihajlo's real distribution (avg dur 442, REM ~20%, eff ~0.97) so the score has dynamic range. REM uses straight rem_pct/target. state_bias_points (matrix modulation) is added in Step A3.

spo2._comment: FEAT-01 Part B: blood-oxygen (SpO2) modulator. Source: Google Health daily-oxygen-saturation (not the Fitbit Web API — see B0 findings). Evaluates yesterday's measured SpO2 (the freshest post-sleep value) against a fixed baseline; the 7-day rolling avg (nulls excluded) is surfaced for monitoring/self-calibration. Flag = abs floor OR drop>=threshold below baseline. Wellness signal, not a medical reading. state_bias_points modulates the matrix (Step B3). Issue-02 (2026-06-17): static baseline kept (SpO2 is floor-like, not relative like HRV — a drifting baseline would mask a sustained decline) but recalibrated to Mihajlo's actual avg (~95.6) with a tightened drop; prior 96/2/94 fired 0/16 nights (baseline at top of his 94.2–96.5 range, relative arm collapsed onto the 94 floor). Now 95.5/0.7/92 fires on the low-night cluster (<=94.8, ~4/16); floor 92 is the rare genuine-concern net. Drift is visible in the rolling avg (weekly review) — nudge baseline if his norm shifts.

weekend_recap._comment: Decision F: flag-gated weekend positive recap when the week skews Sweet Spot/stable.
